title: Risk Matrix Builder
when_to_use: After identifying threats or vulnerabilities; used in every risk ranking task

steps.title: Draw the Grid
steps.instruction: Draw a 5×5 grid: Likelihood (vertical) vs Impact (horizontal)
steps.tip: Use a spreadsheet for clean formatting, or draw by hand for quick fieldwork

steps.title: Label Rows
steps.instruction: Label rows: Very Unlikely, Unlikely, Possible, Likely, Very Likely
steps.tip: Consider the African context: infrastructure reliability, mobile-first users, bandwidth constraints

steps.title: Label Columns
steps.instruction: Label columns: Negligible, Minor, Moderate, Major, Critical
steps.tip: Impact should consider: data sensitivity, financial loss, operational disruption, regulatory penalties

steps.title: Colour-Code Zones
steps.tip: The diagonal from bottom-left to top-right transitions from green to red

steps.title: Place Risks
steps.instruction: Place each identified risk on the matrix and justify placement
steps.tip: Write one sentence per risk explaining why you placed it where you did
